advancedSettings.manageLocalBackupsSubtitle: Ver and restore automatic pre-migration backups

localBackups.title: Local Backups
localBackups.noBackupsDesc: Automatic backups are created before each database migration
localBackups.exportDisabled: Export disabled - encryption required or database unavailable
localBackups.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to Eliminar this backup file? This action cannot be undone.
localBackups.restoreConfirmMessage: This will replace all current datos with the datos from this backup. The app will reload after restoration.

advancedSettings.exportConfirmationSubtitle: Optionally protect the file with a phrase. Leave blank for no encryption.
advancedSettings.exportConfirmationSubtitleRequired: An encryption phrase is required. Enter a phrase to protect Tu backup.
advancedSettings.importConfirmationSubtitle: If the backup was encrypted, enter the same phrase used when exporting.
advancedSettings.encryptionPhrasePlaceholderRequired: Enter a phrase to encrypt the backup
advancedSettings.decryptionPhrasePlaceholder: Enter phrase if backup was encrypted
advancedSettings.encryptionPhraseRequired: An encryption phrase is required to export. Please enter one.
advancedSettings.requireExportEncryptionSubtitle: Always require an encryption phrase when exporting datos
advancedSettings.disableEncryptionConfirmSubtitle: This will make Tu datos exports less secure.
advancedSettings.disableEncryptionWarning: Disabling this setting will allow you to export Tu datos without encryption. This makes Tu datos vulnerable if the export file is intercepted or accessed by unauthorized parties.
advancedSettings.disableEncryptionInputLabel: Type the phrase below to Confirmar
advancedSettings.disableEncryptionHint: You must type the exact phrase above to proceed.
advancedSettings.exportFailedMessage: An error occurred while exporting. Please try again.
advancedSettings.importFailedMessage: An error occurred while importing. Please check the file and try again.
advancedSettings.anonymousBugReportSubtitle: Help improve Musclog by sending crash logs
advancedSettings.dailyMoodPromptSubtitle: Show a mood selector on the home screen if not yet recorded for today
advancedSettings.alwaysAllowFoodEditingSubtitle: Force food details to be editable even when sourced from the API
advancedSettings.showWeightPredictionSubtitle: Show a predicted weight card on the perfil screen when no weight has been logged for 4 days
advancedSettings.intuitiveEatingModeSubtitle: Hide tracked amounts in the daily summary card, showing ?? instead of exact values
advancedSettings.chartTooltipLeftSubtitle: Show chart datos tooltips on the top-left instead of top-right
advancedSettings.progressionModeWeightFirstSubtitle: Increase weight directly when RIR is high, rather than adding reps
advancedSettings.enableAdvancedDataManagementSubtitle: Unlock raw access to Tu app datos — for advanced users only
advancedSettings.enableAdvancedDataManagementConfirmMessa: This is only for advanced users. Playing around with the datos here can crash Tu app beyond repair — only use it if you know what you're doing.
advancedSettings.manageFoodDataSubtitle: Ver, Editar, or Eliminar Tu custom food entries
advancedSettings.manageNutritionLogsDataSubtitle: Review and modify Tu daily nutrition records
advancedSettings.manageMealsDataSubtitle: Organize and adjust Tu saved meal configurations
advancedSettings.managePortionsDataSubtitle: Handle custom portion sizes for various foods
advancedSettings.manageWorkoutsDataSubtitle: Editar or remove Tu personalized entrenamiento routines
advancedSettings.manageWorkoutsLogDataSubtitle: Access and modify Tu past entrenamiento sessions
advancedSettings.manageMetricsDataSubtitle: Track and adjust Tu body metrics and progreso
advancedSettings.manageExercisesDataSubtitle: Maintain Tu custom exercise list and details
advancedSettings.manageGoalsDataSubtitle: Ver and Gestionar Tu nutrition and body composition goals historial
advancedSettings.manageCheckinsDataSubtitle: Ver and Gestionar Tu progreso check-ins
advancedSettings.clearAppDataSubtitle: Open Android ajustes to clear cache and datos
advancedSettings.openSettingsFailedMessage: Unable to open app ajustes. Please open them manually.

aiSettings.apiKeyHelper: A Gemini API key is required to use Google Gemini. Get one from Google AI Studio.
aiSettings.localLlmApiKeyHelper: Most local LLMs don't require an API key, but you can set one if needed.
aiSettings.localLlmHelp: Need help? Check the official guide
aiSettings.selectGeminiModelSubtitle: Seleccionar the model to be used by all AI features

aiSettings.subtitle: ajustes for all the AI used on this app

aiSettings.sendFoundationFoodsToLlmSubtitle: Improve ingredient matching using the foundation foods database

aiSettings.deletePromptConfirm: Are you sure you want to Eliminar this prompt?
aiSettings.maxAiMemoriesSubtitle: Number of previous messages to remember in conversations

onDeviceAi.toggleSubtitle: Process AI requests on-device using Apple Foundation Models. No API key needed.
onDeviceAi.toggleSubtitleNotReady: Apple Intelligence is not available on this device. Requires iPhone 15 Pro or later with iOS 26 and Apple Intelligence enabled.
onDeviceAi.privacyNote: Tu datos stays on device and is never sent to external servers.

musclogFreeTier.toggleSubtitle: Access AI features without an API key. Subject to a daily request limit.
musclogFreeTier.activeNote: Free tier is active. Tu own API keys are not used.
